# Desert Recovery Centers
> Luxury addiction treatment and mental health center in Arizona with locations in Glendale, Scottsdale, and Phoenix.

## About
Desert Recovery Centers is a Joint Commission accredited luxury behavioral health treatment organization. We maintain a maximum of 10 beds per residential location and employ doctoral-level clinical psychologists. We specialize in dual diagnosis treatment.

## Locations
- Glendale: 8105 W Frier Dr, Glendale AZ 85303, (623) 323-1012
- Scottsdale: 23222 N Church Rd, Scottsdale AZ 85255, (480) 931-3617
- Phoenix: 1623 W Moody Trail, Phoenix AZ 85041, (623) 257-5384

## Conditions Treated
Mental health: Anxiety, Depression, PTSD, Bipolar Disorder, OCD, Personality Disorders, ADHD, Schizophrenia
Addiction: Alcohol, Opioids, Cocaine, Meth, Fentanyl, Prescription Drugs, Marijuana, Gambling, Sex Addiction, Stimulants

## Treatments Offered
CBT, DBT, EMDR, Dual Diagnosis, Trauma Therapy, Holistic Therapies, SoftWave Therapy, BridgeWork™, 12-Step

## Accreditations
- Joint Commission Accredited (National Quality Approval)
- LegitScript Certified

## Insurance
Accepts most private and commercial insurance. In-network with Tricare and TriWest. Does not accept Medicaid or Medicare. Coverage varies by plan.

## Contact
Phone: (480) 931-3617
Email: contact@desertrecoverycenters.com
Website: https://desertrecoverycenters.com
